name: Best Chance Heating and Cooling
tagline: Owner-operated HVAC for Sonoma & Marin County homes
seoDescription: Best Chance Heating and Cooling is a licensed, owner-operated HVAC contractor in Santa Rosa, CA serving Sonoma and Marin County. AC, heat pumps & furnaces.

sections.heading: Comfort installed and serviced by the owner himself
sections.subheading: Best Chance Heating and Cooling is the owner-operated HVAC company Sonoma and Marin County homeowners call for honest installs, fair repairs, and 15+ years of hands-on experience on every job.

sections.heading: Heating and cooling services for home and business

items.title: Air Conditioning Installation & Repair
items.description: Central air conditioner installation, replacement, and repair for residential and commercial properties, sized and installed for efficient cooling all season.

items.title: Heat Pump Systems
items.description: High-efficiency heat pump installation and service that delivers both heating and cooling from a single system — a smart upgrade for Sonoma and Marin homes.

items.title: Ductless Mini-Split Systems
items.description: Ductless mini-split installation for additions, conversions, and rooms that are hard to heat or cool, giving you room-by-room comfort control.

items.title: Heating & Furnace Service
items.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance of heating and furnace systems to keep your home warm and running reliably through the colder months.

items.title: Water Heater Service
items.description: Water heater removal, replacement, and installation — typically completed same-day, including swapping an old tank for a new unit in around two hours.

items.title: Maintenance & Emergency Service
items.description: Preventive maintenance to keep systems running smoothly year-round, plus responsive emergency service when something stops working.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Best Chance Heating and Cooling and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: About Best Chance Heating and Cooling
body: Best Chance Heating and Cooling is the company owner Chance Rosado started after more than 15 years working hands-on in the HVAC industry. He decided to go out on his own to deliver the kind of quality service and reliable, year-round comfort he believed customers deserved — and as an owner-operator, he takes pride in every job he completes.

Locally owned and operated in Sonoma County and serving Marin County, Best Chance handles everything from precise new installations to routine maintenance and emergency repairs that keep heating and cooling systems running smoothly all year. The team is fully licensed and insured, and customers consistently praise Chance for being responsive, fair on price, and trustworthy.
highlights: Owner-operated by Chance Rosado, who personally handles every job
5.0 rating with 73 verified ratings on HomeAdvisor (Super Service Award winner)

items.quote: Chance arrived on time and found a very inexpensive way to repair the furnace blower problem.
items.author: HomeAdvisor customer

items.quote: Chance did a great job, arrived on time, removed the old tank and installed the new water heater in 2 hours. Very professional and efficient.
items.author: HomeAdvisor customer

items.quote: Chance is extremely responsive and trustworthy, very experienced and the best there is.
items.author: Repeat customer
